name: GWS Sheets Integration
description: Google Sheets: Read and write spreadsheets using the Google Workspace gws CLI. Covers spreadsheet CRUD, batch updates, value ranges, developer metadata, and sheet-level operations.

covenant_rules: Prerequisite: gws-shared must be loaded first for authentication and global flags.
Always confirm with the user before overwriting spreadsheet data, deleting sheets, or running batch updates.
Use A1 notation for range specification — validate range syntax before constructing commands.
Use gws schema sheets.<resource>.<method> to inspect required parameters before constructing API calls.

triad_templates.left_hemisphere: Evaluate the Sheets API method, range notation, value formatting, and data validation rules for: {query}. Verify A1 notation syntax and grid coordinate boundaries.
triad_templates.right_hemisphere: Design the exact gws sheets command with proper resource, method, --params for spreadsheetId/ranges, --json for valueRanges/batchUpdate requests, and --format for data display: {query}.
triad_templates.main_hemisphere: Coordinate Sheets operations. Inspect method schema, construct command, confirm data mutations, execute, and present spreadsheet data results: {query}.

steps.name: Inspect Sheets API Method Schema
steps.action: Use 'gws schema sheets.<resource>.<method>' to inspect required parameters. Resources: spreadsheets (batchUpdate, create, get, getByDataFilter, developerMetadata, sheets, values).

steps.name: Construct Sheets Command
steps.action: Build the 'gws sheets <resource> <method>' command. For values operations include --params with spreadsheetId and range (A1 notation). For batchUpdate include --json with requests array. For create include --json with spreadsheet properties.

steps.name: Confirm Sheets Mutations
steps.action: For create, update, batchUpdate, or delete operations on data/sheets, present the command to the user for confirmation. For read-only operations (get, getByDataFilter), proceed automatically.

steps.name: Execute Sheets Command
steps.action: Execute the gws sheets command. Use --format table for value ranges to show data in a grid-like view. Use --format json for full spreadsheet metadata.

steps.name: Format and Present Sheets Results
steps.action: Format the output into readable data presentation. For value ranges show data in a markdown table. For spreadsheet metadata show sheet names, grid dimensions, and properties. For batchUpdate results show the reply details.

steps.name: Sheets Operation Completed
steps.action: Confirm the Sheets operation result. Provide next-step suggestions such as appending more data, requesting specific cell formatting, or creating charts.
